prompt: A dramatic sports photograph of a Manchester City player in a sky blue kit standing center frame in a rainy stadium, lifting the English Premier League trophy high above his head with both hands. The large silver trophy has a gold crown on top, 2 pale blue ribbons hanging from the handles, and the visible engraved text "Premier League" on the front. The player wears a modern football jersey with dark sponsor text reading "ETIHAD AIRWAYS" and a small chest crest, with arms fully extended upward in a triumphant victory pose. Compose it as a tight vertical crop from mid-torso upward, with the trophy dominating the upper center and partially covering the player's head. Add heavy falling rain, wet reflective metal, moody overcast lighting, shallow depth of field, and a blurred stadium crowd in the background. On the right side of the background, include a bright blue electronic screen with the large glowing word GOAL. Photorealistic editorial sports photography, high detail, natural stadium colors, celebration moment, slightly telephoto look, crisp focus on the trophy and upper body.
